insight: On 1.21+, `ItemStack.toString()` runs the full data-component codec encode and is very expensive (heavy TLAB allocation, G1 mutex contention). Any `Debugger.debug("scan", "... " + item)` in scan hot paths must be guarded with `if (Debugger.isDebugged("scan"))` since Java builds the concat before the debug method checks if the section is enabled. Spark traces showing `Rule$RuleCheck.check0` -> `String.valueOf` -> `CraftMetaItem.serialize` -> Mojang codecs point to this.
